channel.title: INtravel
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtravel, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: I’ve never flown Alaska Airlines before — here’s why I want its new premium credit card
item.description: Here's why the Atmos Rewards Summit Visa Infinite Credit Card from Alaska Airlines is compelling even if you never fly the airline.

item.title: Capital One Venture X cardholders get early access to 2026 World Cup tickets
item.description: Capital One Venture X cardholders can buy select 2026 World Cup tickets before FIFA's general sale. Here’s how the exclusive sale works.

item.title: The best Mediterranean cruises for every type of traveler
item.description: Learn which cruise lines offer a variety of European options — whether you’re a culture vulture, beach lover, history buff or family traveler.

item.title: 22 best Hyatt hotels in the world to book with points
item.description: From glitzy all-inclusive resorts to city hotels nestled close to the clouds, here are some of the best Hyatt hotels in the world that you can book wi...

item.title: Ultimate guide to Frontier Miles: How to earn and redeem miles, elite status and more
item.description: Here's how to earn and redeem Frontier miles, maximize the airline's elite status benefits, and more.
